series_metadata.series_description: Materials NOT COVERED BY ANOTHER RETENTION SCHEDULE related to special events, presentations or contests, including forms, advertisements, banners, third party materials submitted to ODA, Power Point presentations, photos and any other related material.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 1 year or until no longer necessary, then destroy ; Paper: Retain 1 year or until no longer necessary, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
